Completion.title: Thank you for completing registration!
Completion.subtitle: Your profile is now being reviewed by our team. This process ensures quality tutors on our platform. We'll notify you via email once it's approved.
Completion.helpText: Need help? Contact our support team at mezonly.support@gmail.com.

pending.title: Your tutor profile is being reviewed
pending.description: Please wait for our review result via email. We usually complete this within 48 hours.

approved.title: You are already a tutor
approved.description: Your profile has been approved. You can now manage booking requests and your schedule.

rejected.title: Your tutor profile needs updates
rejected.description: Your previous submission was rejected. Please update your profile information and submit again.
